Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Exports the contents of a grid (using the selected order and filters) to an Excel file. LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'OpenDocument'
&CellRow = 1 &FirstColumn = 1
Do 'LoadGridState'
Do 'WriteFilters'
Do 'WriteColumnTitles'
Do 'WriteData'
Do 'CloseDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Sub 'OpenDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&Random = Random() * 10000 &Filename = !"ExportwwPagamentoFolhas-" + &Random.ToString().Trim() + !".xlsx"
&ExcelDocument.Open(&Filename) Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Clear()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteFilters'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not (&FPagAno.IsEmpty() AND &FPagMes.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Ano") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &FPagAno &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = '' do Case Case &FPagMes = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "1 - Janeiro"
Case &FPagMes = 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "2 - Fevereiro"
Case &FPagMes = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "3 - Março"
Case &FPagMes = 4 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "4 - Abril"
Case &FPagMes = 5 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "5 - Maio"
Case &FPagMes = 6 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "6 - Junho"
Case &FPagMes = 7 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "7 - Julho"
Case &FPagMes = 8 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "8 - Agosto"
Case &FPagMes = 9 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "9 - Setembro"
Case &FPagMes = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "10 - Outubro"
Case &FPagMes = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "11 - Novembro"
Case &FPagMes = 12 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "12 - Dezembro"
Case &FPagMes = 13 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "Décimo Terceiro - Integral"
Case &FPagMes = 16 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "Décimo Terceiro - Parc.1"
Case &FPagMes = 17 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "Décimo Terceiro - Parc.2"
EndCase EndIf
If not (&FPagTip.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Tipo") If Not &FPagTip.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &FPagTip.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf
If not (&FPagFunFilCod.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Filial") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &FPagFunFilCod EndIf
If not (&FPagSts.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Status") If Not &FPagSts.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &FPagSts.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' &FPagPesRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &FPagPesRaz1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Func." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&FPagPesRaz1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FPAGPESCOD' &FPagPesCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &FPagPesCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Func." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &FPagPesCod1 EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' &FPagPesRaz2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &FPagPesRaz2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Func." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&FPagPesRaz2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FPAGPESCOD' &FPagPesCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &FPagPesCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Func." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &FPagPesCod2 EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 3 &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' &FPagPesRaz3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &FPagPesRaz3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Nome Func." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&FPagPesRaz3) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FPAGPESCOD' &FPagPesCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &FPagPesCod3.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cód. Func." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &FPagPesCod3 EndIf EndCase EndIf EndIf EndIf &CellRow += 2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteColumnTitles'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Text = "Ano" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "Mes" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = "Pessoa" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Text = "Nome" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Text = "Filial" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Text = "Nro.Doc." &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Text = "Total Diária" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Text = "Liberado" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Text = "Status"
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
For each PagamentoFolha order EmpCod (FPagAno) (FPagMes) FPagPesCod when &OrderedBy = 1 order FPagAno when &OrderedBy = 2 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagAno) when &OrderedBy = 2 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagMes when &OrderedBy = 3 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagMes) when &OrderedBy = 3 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagPesCod when &OrderedBy = 4 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagPesCod) when &OrderedBy = 4 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagPesRaz when &OrderedBy = 5 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagPesRaz) when &OrderedBy = 5 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagFunFilCod when &OrderedBy = 6 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagFunFilCod) when &OrderedBy = 6 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagTotNroDoc when &OrderedBy = 7 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagTotNroDoc) when &OrderedBy = 7 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagTotVlr when &OrderedBy = 8 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagTotVlr) when &OrderedBy = 8 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagLibPgt when &OrderedBy = 9 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagLibPgt) when &OrderedBy = 9 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagSts when &OrderedBy = 10 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagSts) when &OrderedBy = 10 AND &OrderedDsc = True
using DSwwPagamentoFolhas(&FPagAno, &FPagMes, &FPagTip, &FPagFunFilCod, &FPagSts, &DynamicFiltersSelector1 , &FPagPesRaz1, &FPagPesCod1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &FPagPesRaz2, &FPagPesCod2 , &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &FPagPesRaz3, &FPagPesCod3)
// Write cell values &CellRow += 1
Do 'BeforeWriteLine' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 0).Number = FPagAno &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = '' do Case Case FPagMes = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "1 - Janeiro"
Case FPagMes = 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "2 - Fevereiro"
Case FPagMes = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "3 - Março"
Case FPagMes = 4 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "4 - Abril"
Case FPagMes = 5 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "5 - Maio"
Case FPagMes = 6 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "6 - Junho"
Case FPagMes = 7 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "7 - Julho"
Case FPagMes = 8 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "8 - Agosto"
Case FPagMes = 9 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "9 - Setembro"
Case FPagMes = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "10 - Outubro"
Case FPagMes = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "11 - Novembro"
Case FPagMes = 12 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "12 - Dezembro"
Case FPagMes = 13 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "Décimo Terceiro - Integral"
Case FPagMes = 16 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "Décimo Terceiro - Parc.1"
Case FPagMes = 17 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "Décimo Terceiro - Parc.2"
EndCase &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Number = FPagPesCod &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(FPagPesRaz) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4).Number = FPagFunFilCod &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(FPagTotNroDoc) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 6).Number = FPagTotVlr &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 7).Text = FPagLibPgt.ToString() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 8).Text = FPagSts.EnumerationDescription()
Do 'AfterWriteLine'
Endfor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'CloseDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&ExcelDocument.Save() Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Close()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'CheckStatus'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If (&ExcelDocument.ErrCode <> 0) &Filename = "" &ErrorMessage = &ExcelDocument.ErrDescription &ExcelDocument.Close() Return EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(!"wwPagamentoFolhasGridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(!"wwPagamentoFolhasGridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(!"wwPagamentoFolhasGridState")) Endif
&OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGANO" &FPagAno.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGMES" &FPagMes.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGTIP" &FPagTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGFUNFILCOD" &FPagFunFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGSTS" &FPagSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'BeforeWriteLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AfterWriteLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
